summary: Iteration 5: Solomon AI Analyst feature fully tested and working. All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend Solomon chat UI verified: floating 'Ask Solomon' button, chat panel with welcome screen, sample prompts, AI responses with church-specific context (201 members, giving stats, groups), and suggested action buttons working correctly. Claude Sonnet 4.5 integration via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY functional.

minor.issue: Empty/whitespace-only messages return 520 error instead of validation error
minor.note: Edge case - normal messages work correctly

details: Returns AI response with church-specific context
Session management works correctly
Response includes session_id, response text
Suggested actions returned for giving/groups/follow-up queries
Knows Abundant Church identity and El Paso location
Returns conversation history with messages array
Each message has role (user/assistant) and content
Nonexistent session returns empty messages array
Clears chat session from memory and database
Returns confirmation message
History returns empty after clear
Floating 'Ask Solomon' button visible on dashboard
Blue gradient styling with sparkle icon
Opens chat panel on click
Hides when panel is open
Panel opens with slide animation
Header shows 'Solomon - AI Church Analyst'
Close button (X) works correctly
Clear button (trash icon) visible when messages exist
Welcome message: 'Welcome! I'm Solomon'
Description of AI capabilities shown
4 sample prompts displayed
Sample prompts clickable to start conversation

prompts: How are our giving trends this month?
details: Clicking prompts sends message to AI
AI responds with relevant church data
AI provides accurate membership data (201 members, 106 active, 28 visitors)
AI provides giving context ($84,250 MTD, $350,000 goal, 24% progress)
AI provides group engagement info (20 active groups)
AI includes actionable recommendations
Response formatted with markdown (bold, lists)
Giving queries show: 'View Members Needing Follow-up', 'Send Bulk Message'
Group queries show: 'View Groups', 'Create New Group'
Action buttons have navigate paths to relevant pages
Clear button appears when messages exist
Clicking clears conversation and shows welcome screen
Session cleared from backend

seed_data_creation: Using existing seeded data from previous iterations (201 members, 20 groups, 80 households, donations)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Solomon AI integration complete and working. Uses Claude Sonnet 4.5 via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY (configured in backend/.env). Conversations stored in MongoDB collection 'solomon_conversations'. All 3 endpoints tested: POST /api/solomon/chat, GET /api/solomon/history/{session_id}, DELETE /api/solomon/session/{session_id}. Frontend chat component fully functional with sample prompts and action buttons.

mocked_apis_note.Solomon_AI: NOT MOCKED - Uses real Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Emergent LLM integration
mocked_apis_note.note: AI responses contain real church data from database
